Research.title: [Promo Code] GO Tour Fairy Type Timed Research
Research.description:
All Trainers can redeem the following code to receive Fairy type Timed Research available starting with Pokémon GO Tour in person events.
Code: TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH Quick Redeem: https://store.pokemongo.com/offer-redemption?passcode=TH4NKY0UF41RYMUCH
It is not clear when this promo code will expire. The dates shown on this page are for the Timed Research.

Season.title: Precious Paths

bonuses: Increased Stardust for the first catch of the day
Increased friendship bonus damage dealt by Pokémon in raids
One additional Special Trade per day

Season.description: Welcome to the next Pokémon GO Season: Precious Paths!

Season.title: Memories in Motion

bonuses: Increased XP and Stardust for a seven-day Pokémon catch streak
Increased XP for a seven-day PokéStop spin streak
One additional Candy when trading Pokémon in-person
One guaranteed Candy XL when trading Pokémon in-person (Trainers level 31+)

Season.description:
Welcome to Pokémon GO: Memories in Motion!
In Pokémon GO, Seasons are periods of time that feature new events, Pokémon debuts, and surprises that all follow a certain theme. As the Seasons change, you may find different Pokémon appearing in your area and hatching from Eggs. Make sure to explore during each in-game Season to collect and train as many different Pokémon as you can! You’ll also enjoy special bonuses as you do.

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: February

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Hold 10 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Up to two free Raid Passes from spinning Gym Photo Discs per day

GO Pass.description:
A lovely reward returns! Earn PokéCoins for progressing in GO Pass: February!
From Tuesday, February 3, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, March 3, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for February will be available in Pokémon GO!

GO Pass.title: GO Pass: March

bonuses: 2× Daily Adventure Incense duration
Hold 10 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Hold up to 20 more Gifts in your Item Bag
Increased Stardust and XP from hatching Eggs
Open up to 40 Gifts per day
Open up to 50 Gifts per day
Receive up to 125 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs
Receive up to 150 Gifts per day from spinning PokéStop and Gym Photo Discs

GO Pass.description:
Rank up to earn rewards including a Timed Incubator (GO Pass Deluxe), an encounter with Raikou, and more!
From Tuesday, March 3, at 10:00 a.m. to Tuesday, April 7, at 10:00 a.m. local time, the GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe for March will be available in Pokémon GO!

Event.title: Precious Paths Finale Timed Research
Event.description:
Trainers who open the game between March 2 at 10:00 a.m. to March 3 at 10:00 a.m. local time will get Timed Research for the Precious Paths Finale.
Complete the tasks to receive encounters with Pokémon that were featured throughout the Precious Paths season!

Event.title: Pokémon 30th Anniversary

bonuses: 2× Catch Candy
2× Catch XP
3× Catch Candy
3× Catch XP

Event.description: Celebrate 30 years of Pokémon by going out and catching as many Pokémon as you can! The Pokémon 30th Anniversary event will take place from March 3, 2026 at 10 am to March 9, 2026 at 8 pm local time.

Event.title: Pokémon 30th Anniversary: All Out

bonuses: Incense activated during the event may lead to encounters with Legendary Pokémon—if you're very lucky!
Wild Pokémon will appear more frequently

Event.description:
The Pokémon 30th Anniversary: All Out event will take place from March 7, 2026 at 10 am to March 9, 2026 at 8 pm local time.
You may encounter almost all Pokémon in their natural habitat that have made their Pokémon GO debuts! Most Pokémon that have ever appeared in Pokémon GO will return during this event.

Event.title: Pokémon Pokopia Celebration Event

bonuses: 10× XP for spinning a PokéStop for the first time
2× XP for spinning PokéStops
Increased chance to encounter Shiny Sudowoodo and Shiny Zorua

Event.description:
The Pokémon Pokopia Celebration Event will take place from March 10, 2026 at 10 am to March 16, 2026 at 8 pm local time.
New costumed Ditto will make their Pokémon GO debuts during this event! Learn more about Pokémon Pokopia at pokopia.pokemon.com.

Event.title: Bug Out 2026

bonuses: 2× Candy for successfully catching Pokémon
2× XP for successfully catching Pokémon with Nice Throws or better
Different Pokémon will be attracted to regular Lure Modules during the event
GO Pass Deluxe: 3× Candy for successfully catching Pokémon
Paras, Combee, and Cutiefly attracted to regular Lure Modules will have an increased chance to be Shiny

Event.description: The Bug Out 2026 event will take place from March 17, 2026 at 10 am to March 23, 2026 at 8 pm local time.

Event.title: Unannounced Event
Event.description: The Unannounced Event event will take place from March 31, 2026 at 10 am to April 6, 2026 at 8 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Event.title: Hatch Day
Event.description: The Hatch Day event will take place on April 18, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

Event.title: Example Event Template (Auto ToC Demo)
Event.description:
This file demonstrates the reusable event pattern:
- Keep all section if blocks in the template body.
- Set event_toc_auto: true.
- Fill data lists only for sections you want to show.
- Leave unused section data empty to auto-hide both section and ToC item.

PokéStop Showcase.title: Pokémon Showcase Tuesday
PokéStop Showcase.description:
PokéStop Showcases will be active on Tuesdays, featuring up to 20 different categories. Log in to find out which Pokémon you can show off!
These Showcases run on Tuesdays from 12:00 a.m. to 11:59 a.m. local time.
The following categories may be featured:
- Good Buddy or higher
- Great Buddy or higher
- Normal
- Fighting
- Flying
- Poison
- Ground
- Rock
- Bug
- Ghost
- Steel
- Fire
- Water
- Grass
- Electric
- Psychic
- Ice
- Dragon
- Dark
- Fairy

GO Battle League.title: Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition | Precious Paths
GO Battle League.description:
The Great League, Ultra League, and Master League: Mega Edition will run from February 24, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. to March 3, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. PT.
Trainers will also receive 4× Stardust from win rewards (this does not include end-of-set rewards).
- Pokémon must be at or below 1,500 CP to enter.
- Pokémon must be at or below 2,500 CP to enter.
- No CP limit.
- Mega-Evolved Pokémon are allowed.

Raid Battles.description: Lunala will be in five-star raid battles from March 2, 2026 to March 3, 2026.

Max Mondays.title: Dynamax Pikachu during Max Monday
Max Mondays.description:
These Dynamax Pokémon may appear in Max Battles throughout Precious Paths. They will also take over Power Spots for an hour each week on Mondays from 6:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time!
On March 9, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokémon is Pikachu.
- Pikachu

Community Day.title: Scorbunny Community Day
